allow: PowerShell(npm run build > build.log 2>&1; "exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; Get-Content build.log | Select-String "error" | Select-Object -First 5; Remove-Item build.log)
PowerShell(npm run build > build.log 2>&1; "exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; Get-Content build.log | Select-String "error|Error" | Select-Object -First 6; Remove-Item build.log)
